coordinates: signed axis coordinate along the positive-negative quotient-center geodesic
signed perpendicular hyperbolic residual coordinate in the quotient-center geodesic frame
chart_rule.elbow_classifier: positive iff axis > high_axis_threshold, or axis > low_axis_threshold and residual > residual_gate_threshold
chart_rule.orientation: positive residual is fixed by the Lorentz cross product of midpoint and positive-axis direction
